LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.label: Bioferrite toxicity
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.description: Ravaged by the effects of bioferrite toxicity.
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.stages.1.label: moderate
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.stages.2.label: major
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.stages.3.label: severe
LanguageData.BioferriteToxicity.stages.4.label: extreme
